title: 建筑空间场景图
description:
案例「hair color」属于建筑/空间。这是一张建筑/空间类案例，重点在空间结构、材质、光影、环境氛围和设计概念。适合改成建筑概念图、室内设计、展厅、商业空间、民宿或未来城市视觉。

原始提示词要点：这条案例原文以英文描述画面，需要转成中文展示版。它的主要内容包括：A highly detailed, realistic photograph of a young East Asian woman sitting in a cluttered backstage dressing room, getting ready for a cosplay event. She has 【hair color：vibrant short red】 hair 风格d in a bob with bangs and is wearing an elaborate fantasy warrior costume featuring a 【costume color：glossy red】 and gold tiered mini skirt, a white corset top with black lace and red lacing, matching glossy arm guards, and thigh-high boots. She is looking down with a focused expression, using her right hand to adjust the arm guard on her left arm. The vanity counter in front of her is messy, covered with makeup brushes, bottles, a hairbrush, and extra hairpieces. A large, ornate 【prop：fantasy sword with a blue blade and gold hilt】 leans against the edge of the counter. The 背景 shows a brightly lit vanity mirror with round bulbs reflecting a clothing rack, capturing a candid, s光线ly over-sharpened, and highly textured photographic 风格.
prompt_raw: A highly detailed, realistic photograph of a young East Asian woman sitting in a cluttered backstage dressing room, getting ready for a cosplay event. She has vibrant short red hair styled in a bob with bangs and is wearing an elaborate fantasy warrior costume featuring a glossy red and gold tiered mini skirt, a white corset top with black lace and red lacing, matching glossy arm guards, and thigh-high boots. She is looking down with a focused expression, using her right hand to adjust the arm guard on her left arm. The vanity counter in front of her is messy, covered with makeup brushes, bottles, a hairbrush, and extra hairpieces. A large, ornate fantasy sword with a blue blade and gold hilt leans against the edge of the counter. The background shows a brightly lit vanity mirror with round bulbs reflecting a clothing rack, capturing a candid, slightly over-sharpened, and highly textured photographic style.

prompt_template_cn:
设计一张【空间/建筑名称】的建筑空间视觉图。

空间类型：
这是一个【空间类型】，位于【环境/地点】，服务于【使用人群/功能】。

设计概念：
核心设计理念是【设计概念】，整体气质为【空间气质】。

空间元素：
画面中包含【主要结构】、【材质】、【家具/装置】、【景观/自然元素】等内容。

光影与氛围：
采用【时间/光线】，氛围为【氛围关键词】，色彩为【主色调】。

镜头构图：
使用【镜头视角】，突出空间纵深、尺度和材质细节。

输出要求：
画面高质量，像建筑表现图或空间设计提案，比例为【画面比例】。
